violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Inside of warmers needs cleaned. Fan by the drive up window has dust buildup.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Vent hood over the fryers needs cleaned.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Sani system on the 3 comp sink is not working. Employee needed to add Quat manually.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Storage shed out back needs to have the door closed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors of the walk in cooler and freezer need cleaned. Ceiling vent in the drive up window area has dust buildup.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. Employee beverages need a lid/straw when being consumed in the kitchen.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil (ice scoop for large ice bin) was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Currently being stored on top of ice maker which is a dusty/dirty surface.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. Hot hold unit for cooked fried chicken tenders has build up of grease and filth and needs to be thoroughly cleaned.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Can opener blade has build up of filth/food debris and must be cleaned more often.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service items were not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Both doors to back storage shed were wide open during time of inspection with multiple boxes lying on the floor/ground. There was snow on several of the boxes from being exposed to the elements. Doors must remain closed when there is no one in the shed to grab supplies.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean or kept in good repair. Men's room was not clean and needs the hand towels refilled.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling air vents above stainless cooler in the drive-thru area are caked with dust and need to be cleaned. There is trash on the floor under the soda dispenser in the drive-thru area as well as under the soda dispenser in the lobby.

Installed, maintained (1 pt deducted)
